message:
feat(Lib): Implement _ast_unparse, idlelib, test, tkinter, turtle, turtledemo modules

- _ast_unparse: AST unparsing with Precedence enum, Unparser, escapeString, getOperator
- idlelib: IDLE config, ColorScheme, KeyBinding, builtin_extensions
- test: Test assertions (assertEqual, assertTrue, etc.), TestResult, Resource handling
- tkinter: Tk GUI widgets (Widget, Button, Entry, Text, Canvas), constants, dialogs
- turtle: Full Turtle graphics with movement, pen control, visibility, Screen
- turtledemo: Demo patterns (square, triangle, star, koch, sierpinski, tree)
